title: Wasted Screen GTA
description: Transform the Minecraft death screen into the classic "WASTED" transition from GTA, complete with grayscale filtering and synchronized audio.
body:
Wasted Screen GTA
Transform your Minecraft death screen into the classic GTA "WASTED" experience. This mod provides a cinematic transition that makes every death iconic.

Features
Wasted Interface: A stylized horizontal black bar with red text that replaces the default vanilla death screen.

Cinematic Filter: A custom grayscale effect that drains color from the game world the moment you die.

Synchronized Audio: Features the classic death sound effect, perfectly timed with the animation for a seamless experience.

Requirements
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
